title: Anyone have translations of the scans of Misatos apartment
display_title: Anyone have translations of the scans of Misatos apartment
wikitext:
[]: Anyone have translations of the scans of Misato's apartment?             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:49 pm I've got the Newtype 100% collection, so I can scan it if need be. Just curious what details were given. Is there somewhere to find this?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:53 pm I could translate it for you if you want.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:56 pm This, you mean?

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:04 pm that place seems WAY too big to be in Japan

[]:             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:06 pm Who is awesome? Mr. Tines, thats who. Thanks man. What else you got laying around translated? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:08 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: that place seems WAY too big to be in Japan

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:12 pm It does seem quite big, but didn't half of the population of earth vanish, so I don't think property space is going to be of much problem.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:15 pm macrossmaster wrote: Thanks man. What else you got laying around translated? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:16 pm Is there something like that for Nerv HQ?

[]:             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:17 pm Not to mention former luxurious quarters are going to be available. I always took the exterior shots of her apartment building as the most poignant reminder of the loss of people – that her lights are the only ones on, and she seems to live alone in the building.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:20 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: Is there something like that for Nerv HQ?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:46 pm What's labeled as "Asuka's Room" in the lower right I thought was Shinji's room Because what's labeled as "Shinji's Room" on there has no windows. I need to examine more scenes because I've actually rarely seen Asuka sleeping in her own room and such.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 05, 2008 6:53 pm Asuka turfed Shinji out of his room when she moved in; he ends up sleeping in the broom cupboard. We only see her in that room when she's moping (episode 20+)

[]:             Quote Post by universalperson » Sat Jan 05, 2008 7:07 pm EDIT: Nevermind. Hmm...there's an entire part of Rei's room with nothing in it...but of course, what else do you expect?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Sat Jan 05, 2008 7:10 pm Yes, I mean we get shots in Episodes 14 and 20 of Asuka lying in bed seen from above, which do show she has the room with a window, but otherwise we don't really get normal shots of stuff happening in there. wait...we do see the "Entrirr Verbotten" sign a few times....wait, does Shinji move back into the room Asuka claimed (temporarily) when Asuka runs away? EDIT: Wait, yes, yes, looking at the scene in Episode 23 where Misato goes to comfort Shinji after they think Rei has died when Eva 00 explodes. They don't show Misato in the doorway but they do show her shadow; it's obviously not the same room as Asuka's plus the interior and ceiling is different; apparently no windows, etc.
summary:
[]: Anyone have translations of the scans of Misato's apartment?             Quote Post by macrossmaster » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:49 pm I've got the Newtype 100% collection, so I can scan it if need be. Just curious what details were given. Is there somewhere to find this?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Sat Jan 05, 2008 5:53 pm I could translate it for you if you want
